_comment: Pre-computed outputs for Lab 4. Use if Ollama unavailable.

freeform_sample_outputs:
The user story breaks down as follows:

- **Actor**: Project manager
- **Action**: Assign tasks to team members
- **Goal**: Ensure work is distributed evenly across the team

This is a standard management-level user story focused on resource allocation.

Actor: developer
Action: filter tasks by status and priority
Goal: to focus on what matters most
{"actor": "admin", "action": "export project data to CSV", "goal": "share reports with stakeholders"}
The QA engineer wants to link test cases to tasks. The goal is tracking test coverage per feature.

From this user story:
1. Who: team lead
2. What: create task templates
3. Why: faster sprint setup
format_constrained_sample_outputs: {"actor": "project manager", "action": "assign tasks to team members", "goal": "work is distributed evenly"}
{"actor": "developer", "action": "filter tasks by status and priority", "goal": "focus on what matters most"}
{"actor": "admin", "action": "export project data to CSV", "goal": "share reports with stakeholders"}
{"actor": "QA engineer", "action": "link test cases to tasks", "goal": "test coverage is tracked per feature"}
{"actor": "team lead", "action": "create task templates for recurring workflows", "goal": "sprint setup is faster"}
fewshot_sample_outputs: {"actor": "project manager", "action": "assign tasks to team members", "goal": "work is distributed evenly"}
{"actor": "developer", "action": "filter tasks by status and priority", "goal": "focus on what matters most"}
{"actor": "admin", "action": "export project data to CSV", "goal": "share reports with stakeholders"}
{"actor": "QA engineer", "action": "link test cases to tasks", "goal": "test coverage is tracked per feature"}
{"actor": "team lead", "action": "create task templates for recurring workflows", "goal": "sprint setup is faster"}
{"actor": "user", "action": "drag and drop tasks between columns on the board", "goal": "reorganize task status visually"}
{"actor": "system", "action": "send email notifications when a task is overdue", "goal": "alert users about missed deadlines"}
{"actor": "product owner", "action": "set sprint goals and track velocity over time", "goal": "forecast delivery dates and communicate progress"}
{"actor": "new hire", "action": "get an onboarding checklist that auto-assigns tasks", "goal": "know what to complete in first week"}
{"actor": "developer and code reviewer", "action": "add comments to tasks and tag colleagues", "goal": "discussions are centralized and searchable"}
{"actor": "user", "action": "integrate TaskFlow with Slack, GitHub, and Jira", "goal": "sync notifications and updates across tools"}
{"actor": "security auditor", "action": "view audit log of task modifications", "goal": "compliance requirements are met"}
{"actor": "remote team member", "action": "set availability hours and adjust notifications to local time", "goal": "receive alerts during working hours"}
